name: git
description: Install Git for Windows (silent) and add Git cmd/bin to system PATH.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\git-verify.log'; $g1 = 'C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe'; $g2 = 'C:\Program Files\Git\bin\git.exe'; $g = $null; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $g1) { $g = $g1 } elseif (Test-Path -LiteralPath $g2) { $g = $g2 }; if ($g) { & $g --version | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\git-smoke.txt') -Value 'git_ok' } else { 'git.exe not found' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
